name: achievement without arrival
dynamic: The Prover runs toward recognition while the Judge prevents any result from feeling complete.
trajectory_risk: The person may become more capable while feeling less free.

name: clear analysis, delayed entry
dynamic: The Controller demands certainty while the Observer supplies endless analysis.
trajectory_risk: The person may stay before the threshold of action for years.

name: compliance before disappearance
dynamic: The Pleaser preserves peace until the Escaper takes over and leaves abruptly.
trajectory_risk: Relationships and collaborations may break when others thought everything was fine.

name: controlled life, sudden restart
dynamic: The Controller suppresses risk for too long, then the Escaper seeks a full reset.
trajectory_risk: Life alternates between over-control and abrupt escape.

name: earning love through usefulness
dynamic: The Prover seeks value through achievement while the Pleaser seeks safety through usefulness.
trajectory_risk: The person may become reliable to everyone while postponing their own desire.
